mention.text: @cursorsupport i want a refund for last month can someone fix this

triage.summary: User requests a refund for last month. Refund policy indicates previous billing periods/usage are not eligible; route to hi@cursor.com for an account-specific billing/refund review and cancellation guidance.

suggested_response: Use Refund policy + cancellation docs as the public baseline (previous billing periods not eligible; can cancel to stop future charges). Because this is an account-specific refund request, route to hi@cursor.com (from the email on the account) for review. Do not request sensitive charge details in the public reply.
suggested_reply: Refunds for previous billing periods (like last month) aren’t eligible under our refund policy. You can cancel anytime to stop future charges—cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. If you believe there’s an exception or billing error, email hi@cursor.com from the email on your account with a brief description so the team can review.

sources.title: Billing and payments
sources.snippet: What if my billing issue isn't covered here? Email hi@cursor.com from the email address linked to your account. Include your account details and a description of the issue.

sources.title: Cancel your subscription
sources.snippet: I cancel my subscription? Go to cursor.com/dashboard Click Billing and Invoices in the left sidebar Click Manage Subscription Click Cancel Subscription and confirm...
